message:
fix(circuit_breaker): invoke on_state_change callbacks outside metrics write-lock

Callbacks were previously called while holding the RwLock<Metrics>
write guard.  If a callback tried to read metrics (or do anything
that re-enters the lock), it would deadlock.  Hoist the event tuple
out of the lock scope and fire the callback after the guard is dropped
in record_success and record_failure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
